# wallet.example

中文：[wallet.example](#walletexample-中文)

This is a sample `WTP` vendor publication tree.

Published material:

- [.well-known/wtp/metadata.cbor](.well-known/wtp/metadata.cbor)
  canonical machine-readable trust metadata
- [.well-known/wtp/metadata.json](.well-known/wtp/metadata.json)
  diagnostic trust metadata mirror

Expected production material:

- `.well-known/wtp/metadata.cbor`
  canonical machine-readable trust metadata
- `.well-known/wtp/metadata.json`
  audit-friendly diagnostic mirror

No private keys should be stored in this directory.

## wallet.example 中文

English: [wallet.example](#walletexample)

这是一个 `WTP` 厂商发布目录样例。

已发布材料：

- [.well-known/wtp/metadata.cbor](.well-known/wtp/metadata.cbor)
  canonical 机器可读 trust metadata
- [.well-known/wtp/metadata.json](.well-known/wtp/metadata.json)
  诊断用 trust metadata 镜像

生产环境预期材料：

- `.well-known/wtp/metadata.cbor`
  canonical 机器可读 trust metadata
- `.well-known/wtp/metadata.json`
  便于审计的诊断镜像

不要在该目录保存任何私钥。
